summary: Episode 10: In the dim workshop, Tariq noticed a shaft of sunlight through a small hole in the shutter casting a faint upside-down image of the alley on the wall — a natural wonder of light. Amazed, he tested it, covering and uncovering the hole. Salim taught him that truth is found by patient observation and experiment, not by simply accepting what one is told. Tariq's curiosity and love of learning deepened. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door
Tariq's curiosity and love of learning are growing under Salim's teaching
Tariq and the recovering traveler have become friends; the traveler may soon share news from distant lands
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing and needs more copied pages
